issues.message: The readme field is severely truncated — it only includes the title and first install step, missing all CLI options, configuration reference, page configuration format, custom components, navigation, analytics, and favicon documentation that exist in the actual README.

The how_to_use summary mentions only input/output/assets/theme config options but omits other important options available in page-builder.config.yml: navigation, analytics, favicon, components, css, webpack, baseUrl, minify, sourceMaps, watch.
